tools.name: List Calendar Events
tools.description: Lists events on a Google Calendar.

params.label: calendarId
params.description: The ID of the calendar to retrieve events from. Use 'primary' for the user's default calendar.

params.label: maxResults
params.description: Maximum number of events to return. Defaults to 250.

params.label: timeMin
params.description: Start time (inclusive) for events to query, in RFC3339 format (e.g., 2023-10-27T10:00:00-07:00).

params.label: timeMax
params.description: End time (exclusive) for events to query, in RFC3339 format (e.g., 2023-10-27T17:00:00-07:00).

params.label: q
params.description: Free-text search terms to find events that match this query in the summary, description, or location fields.

params.label: singleEvents
params.description: Whether to expand recurring events into instances. Defaults to false.

tools.responseDescription: A list of calendar events matching the criteria.

tools.name: Create Calendar Event
tools.description: Creates a new event on a Google Calendar.

tools.name: Update Calendar Event
tools.description: Updates an existing event on a Google Calendar.

params.label: calendarId
params.description: The ID of the calendar the event belongs to. Use 'primary' for the user's default calendar.

params.label: eventId
params.description: The ID of the event to update.

params.label: location
params.description: New geographic location of the event.

params.label: start
params.description: New start time of the event. Can be 'dateTime' or 'date'.

params.label: end
params.description: New end time of the event. Can be 'dateTime' or 'date'.

params.label: attendees
params.description: New list of attendees, each as an object with an 'email' property.

tools.name: Delete Calendar Event
tools.description: Deletes an event from a Google Calendar.

params.label: calendarId
params.description: The ID of the calendar the event belongs to. Use 'primary' for the user's default calendar.

params.label: eventId
params.description: The ID of the event to delete.
